Tip of the day
Being overencumbered only slows down your activities, but doesn't affect travel.

Cliff foraging

Cliff foraging
Main Skill: Foraging
Max Efficiency: 200%

Perched on the edge of the towering cliff, you carefully explore the rugged terrain, searching for wild mountain herbs, resilient mushrooms, and other edible treasures that thrive in this elevated environment.

The Cliff foraging activity is a Foraging activity.

Locations

This activity can be done at the following locations:

  • Frostbite Mountain in Jarvonia
  • Sanguine Hills in Jarvonia

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirements

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Foraging lvl. 25.
  • At least Agility lvl. 20.

Experience Information

Skills Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Total Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
XP/Step 		Total Max
XP/Step
Foraging 64 121 0.529 0.661 61 1.049 1.311
Agility 16 0.132 0.262

Drop Tables

Main Drops

Item Name Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R. Value
Single (Stack)
Nothing N/A 15.000% ~1 in 7 N/A N/A N/A
Berries 1-2 67.327% ~1 in 1 120 steps 60 steps 2 (2-4)
Wheat 1 14.026% ~1 in 7 863 steps 435 steps 2 (2)
Honeycomb 1-2 3.507% ~1 in 29 2,300 steps 1,160 steps 2 (2-4)
Feather cape 1 0.140% ~1 in 714 86,429 steps 43,571 steps 66 (66)

Secondary Drops

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.

Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Agility chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 30,250 steps 15,250 steps
Foraging chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 30,250 steps 15,250 steps

Guides

No guides exists yet. You can help make one.

Gear Sets

No gear sets exist yet. You can help make one.

Trivia

  • This activity was the first example in the game of an activity that could drop equipment with the Feather cape].
    • The drop chance was changed in the first update to make it much rarer.


This page is updated automatically to reflect information in the current game version.
